step.title: WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE is set to 1. Writing zip to SitePackagesPath
Copying zip to SitePackages /home/data/SitePackages/20260308171040.zip from request body
Error occurred
step.text: Exception in copying zip file to temp path. Exception: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel.Core.BadHttpRequestException: Reading the request body timed out due to data arriving too slowly. See MinRequestBodyDataRate. at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel.Core.Internal.Http.Http1ContentLengthMessageBody.ReadAsyncInternal(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at System.Runtime.CompilerServices.PoolingAsyncValueTaskMethodBuilder`1.StateMachineBox`1.System.Threading.Tasks.Sources.IValueTaskSource<TResult>.GetResult(Int16 token) at System.IO.Pipelines.PipeReader.CopyToAsyncCore[TStream](TStream destination, Func`4 writeAsync, CancellationToken cancellationToken) at Kudu.Services.Deployment.PushDeploymentController.CopyZipFromRequestBody(String artifactTempPath, ITracer tracer) in /tmp/KuduLite/Kudu.Services/Deployment/PushDeploymentController.cs:line 1496: Reading the request body timed out due to data arriving too slowly. See MinRequestBodyDataRate.
step.stackTrace: at Microsoft.AspNetCore.Server.Kestrel.Core.Internal.Http.Http1ContentLengthMessageBody.ReadAsyncInternal(CancellationToken cancellationToken) at System.Runtime.CompilerServices.PoolingAsyncValueTaskMethodBuilder`1.StateMachineBox`1.System.Threading.Tasks.Sources.IValueTaskSource<TResult>.GetResult(Int16 token) at System.IO.Pipelines.PipeReader.CopyToAsyncCore[TStream](TStream destination, Func`4 writeAsync, CancellationToken cancellationToken) at Kudu.Services.Deployment.PushDeploymentController.CopyZipFromRequestBody(String artifactTempPath, ITracer tracer) in /tmp/KuduLite/Kudu.Services/Deployment/PushDeploymentController.cs:line 1496
